allow: Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); const req = http.get\(''http://localhost:5173/frames/frame_0001.webp'', \(res\) => { console.log\(''Status:'', res.statusCode\); console.log\(''Content-Type:'', res.headers[''content-type'']\); }\); req.on\(''error'', \(e\) => console.error\(''Error:'', e.message\)\);")
